description: A production engineer analyzes real-time data from an Electrical Submersible Pump (ESP) to optimize its frequency for maximum oil production without causing damage.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve real-time sensor data for the target well's ESP, including frequency, intake pressure, and motor temperature.

expected_outcome.expected: Live data stream for the ESP is established and visualized.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the ESP performance curve against the current operating conditions to identify optimization potential.

expected_outcome.expected: The engineer determines the optimal operating frequency.

nodes.task_description: Send a command to the SCADA system to adjust the ESP frequency to the new, optimized setpoint.

expected_outcome.expected: The ESP frequency is successfully adjusted, and production rate increases.
